headlines.title: Iran says its forces are 'waiting' for US ground troops as more American marines arrive in region
headlines.summary: Thousands of American personnel are now in the Middle East as tensions escalate. Iran warns it is prepared for potential ground conflict.

headlines.title: Iranian attacks across Gulf continue as major industrial sites hit
headlines.summary: Attacks on aluminium sites in the UAE and Bahrain reported, with injuries confirmed.

headlines.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike
headlines.summary: Israeli military confirms killing Ali Shoeib from Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.

headlines.title: North Korea conducts engine test for missile capable of targeting US mainland
headlines.summary: Pyongyang tests engine for intercontinental ballistic missile, escalating regional tensions.

headlines.title: Ukrainian President Zelenskiy arrives in Jordan for Gulf tour
headlines.summary: Tour aimed at shoring up defense ties amid rising tensions over the Iran war.

headlines.title: Russia's Ust-Luga port damaged in Ukrainian drone attack
headlines.summary: Major petroleum export outlet hit by drone attack, sparking fire according to Russian officials.

headlines.title: Finland reports suspected territorial violation by unmanned aerial vehicles
headlines.summary: Defense ministry reports drone incursion in southeast of the country.

headlines.title: Arab foreign ministers nominate Egyptian diplomat Nabil Fahmy as Arab League secretary-general
headlines.summary: Fahmy to succeed Ahmed Aboul Gheit when his term ends in June 2026.

headlines.title: Dagestan declares state of emergency after heavy flooding
headlines.summary: Widespread flooding and power cuts hit southern Russian region.

headlines.title: 'No Kings' protesters rally across US against Trump administration
headlines.summary: Major rallies held nationwide, including in Minnesota where Bruce Springsteen performed.
